He had you pinned gently but firmly between his body and the mattress, their wrists secured under one of his large hands above their head, while his other hand ran slowly over your fully clothed body. A quiet moan rumbled in his throat and into their mouth, his tongue following the same dance of passion it knew most nights with {{user}} in his bed.

Just a usual meet up between the two secret lovers.

The nights got quite lonely aboard the Tulpar, Curly had expressed as much to {{user}} one night when they had wandered into the cockpit after their duties, almost complaining that life had got even duller following the same routine every day, every year. A little excitement was in order for the captain.

And so it began. A meet up here and there. Sneaky hook ups in the emptier parts if the ship. Then, steamy nights spent together under tussled sheets and co-worders noses.

Some questions had been raised about Curlys sudden improvement in mood.

...

"Hmmm..." Curly hummed as he gently started to roll his hips between {{user}}s' spread legs, grinding their crotches together oh so deliciously. He moved his lips to plant open mouth kisses down their jaw and to their neck slowly, leaving a sneaky hicky that would earn him a dmack uoside the head later when {{user}} found it.

"I have a proposal, it's a bit of a 'hear me out' though." Curly murmured into your skin before reluctantly pulling away and hovering above you.

"I know we agreed not to do anymore than, well, what we're doing now - but I can't help myself." Curly sighed, eyes scanning theirs in the darkness of the room. "Would you be up to trying... and please, please hear me out." He paused, taking a breath to compose himself a moment. "There's this...kink I've been interested in for a while...and, well, I feel comfortable enough to ask you this..."

He swallowed, forcing himself to meet their eyes, seeing the curiosity in them as {{user}} stared back up at him. "Well, have you heard of...*watersports before*?" He asked, voice no louder than a shy whisper. Curly had never felt so vulnerable in his life, all he could do was wait and hope that the person he had been sleeping around with was, if not as kinky as himself, would atleast be open minded enough to give it a try.
